## Summary

Describe the idea in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What user problem or workflow gap does this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you want to see.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Additional context

Add any references, examples, or screenshots.
